title: Falcon Enhancements Log
description: Typed log of mid-session enhancement ideas, retros, and standards candidates: .claude/enhancements.yaml. Replaces legacy free-form enhancements.md (per DAR 4). Companion doc: .claude/docs/enhancements-schema.md.

thresholds.description: Per-kind alert thresholds. /leroy emits §9 Enhancements Alert when an open-kind count exceeds. Tunable per project.

template_entry.description: Optional documentation entry that travels with the schema.

id.description: Stable identifier: YYYYMMDD-N where N is sequential within the date.

kind.description: Entry type. Each kind has its own state machine (see metadata: enhancements-schema.md).

status.description: Lifecycle state. doc_gap: open→resolved. standards_candidate: open→promoted/retired. retro: typically stays open until archived. workflow_friction/tooling_pain: open→resolved. other: ages out at 90d.

summary.description: One-line summary used in startup counts + grep.

source.description: Where the entry came from: bead ID, 'direct' (session-side capture), or 'falcon-dispatch-<id>'.

target.description: Target doc to update when applying a fix. Null when not applicable (kinds without a target doc).

firings.description: Standards-candidate firing count. Auto-promotes at firings >= 3.

body.description: Multi-line free-form description. Block scalars accept paragraph prose.

resolution_note.description: Populated when status transitions away from open.
